width.description: VIEWPORT design width in pixels (the browser frame). 9:16 PORTRAIT (432x768) so Scale.FIT FILLS a portrait phone and LETTERBOXES centered on a landscape laptop — one fixed canvas plays on both mobile and desktop. OWNED BY core/gameConfig.json (the infra groups) — a module MUST mirror core's screenSize, never diverge (template-contract §4).

height.description: VIEWPORT design height in pixels. 9:16 portrait (432x768) — see width. OWNED BY core (template-contract §4).

paddleSpeed.description: Paddle slide speed (px/s) for the keys control scheme — tunes PaddleController.

ballSpeed.description: Ball launch speed (px/s). CONSTANT — a paddle bounce changes the ANGLE, not the speed (RB §1). The sub-step count scales with this so a fast ball never tunnels (RB §2.2).

lives.description: Starting lives. A ball below the paddle costs EXACTLY one (RB §2.4); 0 lives = lose.

brickPoints.description: Default score awarded per cleared breakable brick (BrickGrid).

paddleWidth.description: Paddle display width (px). The contact-point steering uses the half-width — a wider paddle is more forgiving but steers less sharply at the same offset (RB §2.1).
